workflowTools.purpose: Confirm user, workspace, and running timer.
Show workflow groups and when to use domain tools.
Search compact SDK/CLI/MCP guidance for agents (read-only).
Map a task, operation, or tool to recommended paths (read-only).
Return a compact SDK, CLI, or MCP snippet for a task (read-only).
Create or reuse client, project, task, and tag objects.
Log a finished time entry from names or IDs.
Start a running work timer.
Stop the current running timer.
Stop current work and start another timer.
Review daily totals, gaps, running timers, and missing fields.
Review weekly totals and issues.
Find one entry and update selected fields.
Create a draft invoice for a client.
Prepare or record an expense with resolved names.
Create a time-off request from a policy name or ID.
Create a scheduling assignment from user/project names or IDs.
Create a validated HTTPS webhook subscription.
Create deterministic demo objects.
Clean deterministic demo entries and objects by prefix.
